scripts.dev: concurrently "pnpm --dir apps/api run dev" "pnpm --dir apps/web run dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --dir apps/api run build && pnpm --dir apps/web run build
scripts.check: pnpm --dir apps/api run check && pnpm --dir apps/web run check
scripts.test: pnpm --dir apps/api run test && pnpm --dir apps/web run test
scripts.db:start: pg_ctl -D .\.postgres-data -o "-p 55432 -c listen_addresses=localhost -c shared_buffers=1GB -c work_mem=32MB -c maintenance_work_mem=1GB" -l .\.postgres-log\postgres.log start
